title:
SS/SB 1421 - This act modifies provisions relating to the unlawful use of unmanned aircraft in certain areas. Under current law, it is a criminal offense to operate an unmanned aircraft over an open-air facility. This act modifies this offense by also making it unlawful to operate an unmanned aircraft within the boundary of any critical infrastructure facility, as defined in the act, or within a vertical distance of four hundred feet from the ground and within the boundary of such facility.

	The definition of "open-air facility", as used in this provision, is modified by decreasing the requisite capacity from 5,000 or more people to 500 or more people.

	Under current law, any delivery of a gun, knife, weapon, or other article by an unmanned aircraft over an open-air facility shall be punished as a class B felony. This act adds delivery of any explosive device or material, and adds critical infrastructure as a location where such deliveries are prohibited.

	Law enforcement officers are authorized to take necessary mitigation measures, as described in the act, against an imminent threat posed by an unmanned aircraft system to public safety. This act provides that any unmanned aircraft seized pursuant to this act shall be subject to forfeiture under the criminal activity forfeiture act.

	This act contains an emergency clause.  
TRISTAN BENSON, JR.

HA #1 - CHANGES TITLE TO "RELATING TO PUBLIC SAFETY".

HA #2 - ADDS PROVISIONS RELATING TO SCHOOL BUS SAFETY CAMERAS, THE MISSOURI RANGER PROGRAM, AND THE OFFENSE OF FAILURE TO STOP FOR A SCHOOL BUS.

HA #3 - ADDS PROVISIONS ESTABLISHING AN AUTOMATED EXPUNGEMENT SYSTEM.

HA #4 - MODIFIES PROVISIONS RELATING TO THE ALZHEIMER'S STATE PLAN TASK FORCE.

HA #5 - MODIFIES PROVISIONS RELATING TO THE VALVE INSPECTION PROGRAM.

HA #6 - MODIFIES PROVISIONS RELATING TO THE OFFENSE OF UNLAWFUL SALE OF OVER-THE-COUNTER METHAMPHETAMINE PRECURSOR DRUGS.

HA #7 - MODIFIES PROVISIONS RELATING TO THE OFFENSE OF POSSESSION OF UNLAWFUL ITEMS IN A PRISON OR JAIL.

HA #9 - MODIFIES PROVISIONS WITHIN THE SIDDENS BENING HANDS FREE LAW.

HA #10 - MODIFIES PROVISIONS RELATING TO CRITICAL INFRASTRUCTURE FACILITIES.

HA #11 - CREATES THE OFFENSE OF PERMITTING, ENCOURAGING, AIDING, OR CAUSING A MINOR TO COMMIT AN OFFENSE.

HA #12 - MODIFIES PROVISIONS RELATING TO CONTROLLED SUBSTANCE OFFENSES.

HA #13 - MODIFIES THE OFFENSE OF UNLAWFUL USE OF WEAPONS.

HA #14 - MODIFIES PROVISIONS RELATING TO HATE OFFENSES, AND CREATES THE OFFENSE OF MASKED INTIMIDATION.

HA #15 - MODIFIES PROVISIONS RELATING TO THE COLLECTION OF BIOLOGICAL SAMPLES.

HA #16 - CREATES THE OFFENSE OF IMPEDING, THREATENING, OR HARASSING A FIRST RESPONDER.

HA #17 - CREATES PROVISIONS RELATING TO DOMESTIC VIOLENCE PREVENTION.

HA #18 - MODIFIES PROVISIONS RELATING TO NOTARIES, UNLAWFUL OCCUPANCY OF A RESIDENTIAL DWELLING, THE OFFENSE OF CRIMINAL MISCHIEF, AND THE OFFENSE OF FILING FALSE DOCUMENTS.

HA #1 TO HA #18 - MODIFIES PROVISIONS RELATING TO NOTARY SEALS.

HA #19 - MODIFIES PROVISIONS RELATING TO THE OFFENSE OF GIFT CARD FRAUD.

HA #20 - MODIFIES PROVISIONS RELATING TO THE BOARD OF POLICE COMMISSIONERS AND POLICE OFFICERS.

HA #1 TO HA #20 - MODIFIES PROVISIONS RELATING TO POLICE OFFICER SEPARATION.

HA #21 - MODIFIES PROVISIONS RELATING TO THE IMPOSITION OF THE DEATH PENALTY.

HA #22 - MODIFIES PROVISIONS RELATING TO PREVENTION AND INVESTIGATION OF DRUG OVERDOSES

HA #23 - CREATES PROVISIONS RELATING TO ASSESSMENTS FOR ALLEGED CHILD ABUSE, AND OVERNIGHT AND RESIDENTIAL CAMP STAFF.

HA #24 - CREATES PROVISIONS RELATED TO AN INMATES DISCHARGE FROM IMPRISONMENT FOR A FELONY OFFENSE.

HA #1 TO HA #24 - CREATES PROVISIONS RELATING TO ELIGIBILITY FOR "GOOD TIME" CREDIT AND REPEALS PROVISIONS RELATED TO "GOOD TIME" CREDIT.

HA #2 TO HA #24 - MODIFIES PROVISIONS RELATING TO ELIGIBILITY FOR PAROLE FOR OFFENDERS WITH A LIFE SENTENCE.

HA #25 - CREATES PROVISIONS RELATING TO FIRE AND LIFE SAFETY STANDARDS.

HA #27 - CREATES AND MODIFIES PROVISIONS RELATING TO ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE AND THE OFFENSE OF DISCLOSURE OF A DIGITAL DEPICTION.

HA #28 - CREATES AND MODIFIES PROVISIONS RELATING TO OPERATORS OF COMMERCIAL MOTOR VEHICLES.

HA #29 - CREATES PROVISIONS RELATING TO FIRE PROTECTION DISTRICT SURPLUS PROPERTY.

HA #30 - MODIFIES PROVISIONS RELATING TO CONCEALED CARRY PERMITS.

HA #31 - MODIFIES PROVISIONS RELATING TO MANDATORY REPORTERS OF ADULT ABUSE AND ANIMAL ABUSE.
		
HA #32 - MODIFIES PROVISIONS RELATING TO PROSECUTING ATTORNEY COMPENSATION AND SCHOOL BULLYING.

HA #1 TO HA #32 - MODIFIES PROVISIONS RELATING TO THE ATTORNEY GENERAL.

HA #33 - MODIFIES PROVISIONS RELATING TO CATALYTIC CONVERTERS.

HA #34 - ESTABLISHES THE MISSOURI INTEGRATED SAFE DRIVING PROGRAM.

HA #35 - MODIFIES PROVISIONS RELATING TO VEHICLE CHILD RESTRAINT SYSTEMS.

HA #36 - MODIFIES PROVISIONS RELATING TO PRIVATE INVESTIGATORS, PRIVATE FIRE INVESTIGATORS, PROFESSIONAL SURETY BAIL BOND AGENTS, AND THE OFFENSE OF ASSAULT IN THE FOURTH DEGREE. 

HA #38 - CREATES PROVISIONS RELATING TO A TEACHER DEFENDING THEMSELVES OR A STUDENT FROM THE VIOLENT ACTS OF A STUDENT.

HA #39 - MODIFIES PROVISIONS RELATING TO AN APPLICATION FOR DETENTION FOR EVALUATION AND TREATMENT AT A MENTAL HEALTH FACILITY.

HA #40 - MODIFIES PROVISIONS RELATING TO THE OPERATION OF A MOTORCYCLE AND CREATES CALVIN'S LAW.

HA #41 - MODIFIES PROVISIONS RELATING TO FIRE MARSHAL INVESTIGATIONS OF FIREWORKS.

HA #42 - MODIFIES PROVISIONS RELATING TO THE PURCHASING AUTHORITY OF FIRE PROTECTION DISTRICTS.

HA #43 - MODIFIES PROVISIONS RELATING TO A LONG-TERM TREATMENT PROGRAM IMPLEMENTED BY THE DEPARTMENT OF CORRECTIONS.

HA #44 - CREATES PROVISIONS RELATING TO "MASON'S LAW" AND "BENTLEY AND MASON'S LAW" AND MODIFIES PROVISIONS RELATING TO THE OFFENSE OF DRIVING WHILE INTOXICATED.
